## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Related Issues

Link issues, discussions, or ADRs.

## Validation

- [ ] Tests pass locally
- [ ] CI checks pass
- [ ] Docs updated (if needed)

## Release Impact

- [ ] `feat:` (minor)
- [ ] `fix:` (patch)
- [ ] `BREAKING CHANGE` (major)
- [ ] No release impact
